name: ace-tool
description: ACE — semantic code search. Understands code structure across languages. Better than grep for exploring unfamiliar codebases.
setup: Self-host the relay: https://github.com/heromantf/acemcp-relay (Go backend) + https://github.com/heromantf/acemcp-relay-frontend (token management UI). Then install the CLI client: npm i -g ace-tool
